name: sap-released-objects-mcp-server
description: MCP server for SAP Cloudification Repository - Search released objects, classic APIs, successors with Clean Core Level filtering (A/B/C/D)

scripts.pkg:win: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output bin/sap-released-objects-win.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output bin/sap-released-objects-linux
scripts.pkg:macos: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64 --output bin/sap-released-objects-macos
scripts.pkg:all: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64,node20-linux-x64,node20-macos-x64 --out-path bin/
